_meta.scope: FaceNet model accuracy only (face detection step excluded)
_meta.dataset: synthetic_placeholder — regenerate with LFW: python scripts/gen_face_fixtures.py --lfw-root <path>
_meta.note: Placeholder fixture with statistically realistic embedding distributions (same-pair sim ~0.87, diff-pair sim ~0.35). Run gen_face_fixtures.py with real LFW data for model-validated results.
